_description: All utility and library files in libs/ and utils/. Update UTIL_DESCRIPTIONS in generate-knowledge.mjs when adding new utilities.

utils.name: r2.js
utils.description: Cloudflare R2 (S3-compatible) storage client — used for listing image uploads

utils.name: supabase.js
utils.description: Supabase admin client factory. Default export targets active env. getSupabaseClient('prod'|'dev') for explicit targeting.

utils.name: analytics.js
utils.description: Client-side event tracking via sessionStorage and navigator.sendBeacon

utils.name: listingFormatters.js
utils.description: Rent/area range formatters, listing age calculator, and Supabase→frontend listing normalizer (buildListing)

utils.name: walkTimes.js
utils.description: fetchAllWalkTimes(lat, lng) — calls Mapbox Directions API for WashU places + shuttle stops, returns walk minutes

utils.name: washuPlaces.js
utils.description: WASHU_PLACES and SHUTTLE_STOPS coordinate arrays — used by walkTimes.js for distance calculations

utils.name: client.ts
utils.description: Supabase browser client factory (SSR abstraction) — use in Client Components

utils.name: middleware.ts
utils.description: Supabase middleware client for session refresh in Next.js middleware layer

utils.name: server.ts
utils.description: Supabase server client factory with cookie management — use in Server Components
